response.justification: Bogdan brings solid multi-stack engineering breadth and roughly 17 years of experience, with recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling. However, the role demands a director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, a track record of advising strategic enterprise customers on cloud and AI adoption, and demonstrated AI product leadership at scale — none of which is present in this resume. His career ceiling sits at Staff/Senior, his AI work is nascent and confined to a single recent role, and there is no cloud platform strategy or enterprise advisory background to anchor a Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) hire.
strengths: Broad multi-stack engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure across 17+ years
Current hands-on work in AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators, and agentic developer tooling at re:cinq
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective and builder of several adopted open-source tools
concerns: Career seniority tops out at Staff/Senior level, well short of the director-level IC profile the role requires
AI expertise is shallow and recent with no recognized thought leadership, published research, or AI products built at scale
No evidence of strategic customer advisory, cloud platform strategy work, or large-scale AI adoption initiatives

key_factors.factor: Seniority gap vs. director-level IC requirement
Insufficient depth and track record in AI
Hands-on AI tooling and founder experience
